title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving between Accounts linked to the same Tenant
scenario: Support/App data (Tenant info) persists correctly when switching between different accounts linked to the same Tenant in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Log in with Account A (linked to Tenant X).
Navigate to Account screen and verify Tenant info is displayed correctly.
Log in with Account B (also linked to Tenant X).
Navigate to Account screen and verify Tenant info is displayed correctly.
Switch back to Account A and verify Tenant info remains correct.
Repeat steps 3–7 for any additional accounts linked to the same Tenant X.
expected: Support/App data (Tenant info) remains correct and consistent across all account switches for accounts linked to the same Tenant.
